Link copied to clipboard
data class Attachment(@Json(name = "custom") val custom: Map<String, Any?> = emptyMap(), @Json(name = "asset_url") val assetUrl: String? = null, @Json(name = "author_icon") val authorIcon: String? = null, @Json(name = "author_link") val authorLink: String? = null, @Json(name = "author_name") val authorName: String? = null, @Json(name = "color") val color: String? = null, @Json(name = "fallback") val fallback: String? = null, @Json(name = "footer") val footer: String? = null, @Json(name = "footer_icon") val footerIcon: String? = null, @Json(name = "image_url") val imageUrl: String? = null, @Json(name = "og_scrape_url") val ogScrapeUrl: String? = null, @Json(name = "original_height") val originalHeight: Int? = null, @Json(name = "original_width") val originalWidth: Int? = null, @Json(name = "pretext") val pretext: String? = null, @Json(name = "text") val text: String? = null, @Json(name = "thumb_url") val thumbUrl: String? = null, @Json(name = "title") val title: String? = null, @Json(name = "title_link") val titleLink: String? = null, @Json(name = "type") val type: String? = null, @Json(name = "actions") val actions: List<Action>? = emptyList(), @Json(name = "fields") val fields: List<Field>? = emptyList(), @Json(name = "giphy") val giphy: Images? = null)

An attachment is a message object that represents a file uploaded by a user.

Link copied to clipboard
data class EnrichmentOptions(@Json(name = "enrich_own_followings") val enrichOwnFollowings: Boolean? = null, @Json(name = "include_score_vars") val includeScoreVars: Boolean? = null, @Json(name = "skip_activity") val skipActivity: Boolean? = null, @Json(name = "skip_activity_collections") val skipActivityCollections: Boolean? = null, @Json(name = "skip_activity_comments") val skipActivityComments: Boolean? = null, @Json(name = "skip_activity_current_feed") val skipActivityCurrentFeed: Boolean? = null, @Json(name = "skip_activity_mentioned_users") val skipActivityMentionedUsers: Boolean? = null, @Json(name = "skip_activity_own_bookmarks") val skipActivityOwnBookmarks: Boolean? = null, @Json(name = "skip_activity_parents") val skipActivityParents: Boolean? = null, @Json(name = "skip_activity_poll") val skipActivityPoll: Boolean? = null, @Json(name = "skip_activity_reactions") val skipActivityReactions: Boolean? = null, @Json(name = "skip_activity_refresh_image_urls") val skipActivityRefreshImageUrls: Boolean? = null, @Json(name = "skip_all") val skipAll: Boolean? = null, @Json(name = "skip_feed_member_user") val skipFeedMemberUser: Boolean? = null, @Json(name = "skip_followers") val skipFollowers: Boolean? = null, @Json(name = "skip_following") val skipFollowing: Boolean? = null, @Json(name = "skip_own_capabilities") val skipOwnCapabilities: Boolean? = null, @Json(name = "skip_own_follows") val skipOwnFollows: Boolean? = null, @Json(name = "skip_pins") val skipPins: Boolean? = null)

Options to skip specific enrichments to improve performance. Default is false (enrichments are included). Setting a field to true skips that enrichment.

= null, @Json(name = "edited_at") val editedAt: Date? = null, @Json(name = "expires_at") val expiresAt: Date? = null, @Json(name = "moderation_action") val moderationAction: String? = null, @Json(name = "text") val text: String? = null, @Json(name = "visibility_tag") val visibilityTag: String? = null, @Json(name = "metrics") val metrics: Map<String, Int>? = emptyMap(), @Json(name = "moderation") val moderation: ModerationV2Response?
